languages.text: Этот человек умер недавно — тело еще хранит в себе тепло. Похоже, его попросту еще не успели утилизировать.

traits.locale_text: Этот человек умер недавно — тело ещё хранит в себе тепло. Похоже, его попросту не успели утилизировать к вашему приходу.

languages.text: This man died recently — the body is still warm. It appears it simply has not been disposed of yet.
languages.original_text: Этот человек умер недавно — тело еще хранит в себе тепло. Похоже, его попросту еще не успели утилизировать.

traits.locale_text: This man died recently — the body is still warm. It appears it simply has not been disposed of yet.
This man died recently — the body is still warm. It appears it simply has not been disposed of yet.
This man died recently — the body is still warm. It appears it simply has not been disposed of yet.

languages.text: この人は最近亡くなった。まだ体が温かい。まだ処理されていないようだ。
languages.original_text: This man died recently — the body is still warm. It appears it simply has not been disposed of yet.

languages.text: Bu adam, yakın zamanda ölmüş. Cesedi hâlâ sıcak. Görünüşe göre henüz bertaraf edilmemiş.
languages.original_text: This man died recently — the body is still warm. It appears it simply has not been disposed of yet.

traits.locale_text: Bu adam, yakın zamanda ölmüş. Cesedi hâlâ sıcak. Görünüşe göre henüz bertaraf edilmemiş.

languages.text: 此人离世不久，躯体尚有余温。看来只是尚未被清理。
languages.original_text: This man died recently — the body is still warm. It appears it simply has not been disposed of yet.

traits.locale_text: 此人离世不久，躯体尚有余温。看来只是尚未被清理。

languages.text: Dieser Mann ist kürzlich gestorben. Die Leiche ist noch warm. Er scheint einfach noch nicht entsorgt worden zu sein.
languages.original_text: This man died recently — the body is still warm. It appears it simply has not been disposed of yet.

traits.locale_text: Dieser Mann ist kürzlich gestorben. Die Leiche ist noch warm. Er scheint einfach noch nicht entsorgt worden zu sein.

languages.text: Comme en atteste son corps encore chaud, cet homme est mort il y a peu. Il semble tout simplement que personne ne se soit encore chargé de sa dépouille.
languages.original_text: This man died recently — the body is still warm. It appears it simply has not been disposed of yet.

traits.locale_text: Comme en atteste son corps encore chaud, cet homme est mort il y a peu. Il semble tout simplement que personne ne se soit encore chargé de sa dépouille.

languages.text: Este hombre murió hace poco, el cuerpo aún está caliente. Al parecer, simplemente falta deshacerse de él.
languages.original_text: This man died recently — the body is still warm. It appears it simply has not been disposed of yet.

traits.locale_text: «Este hombre murió hace poco, el cuerpo aún está caliente. Al parecer, simplemente falta deshacerse de él.
